requirement_topic.en: ALMM — Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (PV Modules and Cells — NOT Inverters)
requirement_topic.zh: ALMM — 经批准的型号和制造商名单（适用于光伏组件及电池，不适用于逆变器）
requirement_topic.zht: ALMM — 經批准的型號及製造商名單（適用於光伏組件及電池，不適用於逆變器）

summary.en: India's Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) maintains the Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (ALMM). The official MNRE ALMM framework has two lists: List-I covers Solar PV Modules; List-II covers Solar PV Cells (mandatory from 2026-06-01). There is NO ALMM list for inverters under the MNRE ALMM Order — ALMM does not apply to inverters. The binding mandatory requirement for grid-tied PV inverters in India is BIS CRS registration (IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980), not ALMM. For government-funded, net-metered, or subsidy-linked solar projects, ALMM listing is mandatory only for the PV modules and cells used, not for inverters. Preference is given to domestically manufactured equipment under the Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) framework for modules and cells.
summary.zh: 印度新能源和可再生能源部（MNRE）维护「经批准的型号和制造商名单」（ALMM）。MNRE ALMM官方框架设有两个名单：List-I涵盖太阳能光伏组件；List-II涵盖太阳能光伏电池（自2026年6月1日起强制执行）。根据MNRE ALMM令，逆变器不在ALMM范围内——ALMM不适用于逆变器。印度并网光伏逆变器的强制性要求是BIS CRS注册（IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980），而非ALMM。对于政府资助、净计量或受补贴的太阳能项目，ALMM列名仅针对所使用的光伏组件和电池，不针对逆变器。在国内含量要求（DCR）框架下，组件和电池优先采购国产设备。
summary.zht: 印度新能源及可再生能源部（MNRE）維護「經批准的型號及製造商名單」（ALMM）。MNRE ALMM官方框架設有兩個名單：List-I涵蓋太陽能光伏組件；List-II涵蓋太陽能光伏電池（自2026年6月1日起強制執行）。根據MNRE ALMM令，逆變器不在ALMM範圍內——ALMM不適用於逆變器。印度並網光伏逆變器的強制性要求是BIS CRS註冊（IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980），而非ALMM。對於政府資助、淨計量或受補貼的太陽能項目，ALMM列名僅針對所使用的光伏組件和電池，不針對逆變器。在國內含量要求（DCR）框架下，組件和電池優先採購國產設備。

standards_or_laws: MNRE ALMM Order (latest revision — verify at mnre.gov.in/en/approved-list-of-models-and-manufacturers-almm/) — List-I: PV Modules; List-II: PV Cells only
Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) provisions under applicable MNRE scheme orders (for modules/cells)
Note: ALMM does NOT cover inverters — for inverters the binding requirement is BIS CRS (IS 16221 Part 2, IS 16169, IS 17980:2022)

summary.en: China has no equivalent approved-manufacturer-list regime for grid-tied PV inverters intended for export markets. Chinese inverter manufacturers are regulated domestically under GB standards and CQC/CGC certification, but there is no government-maintained export whitelist for inverters. For PV modules exported to India, ALMM listing is required for government/subsidy projects; Chinese module manufacturers must apply to MNRE independently.
summary.zh: 中国对出口市场的并网光伏逆变器没有类似的「经批准制造商名单」制度。中国逆变器厂商在国内依据GB标准及CQC/CGC认证进行监管，政府不维护类似的逆变器出口白名单。对于出口印度的光伏组件，政府/补贴项目须取得ALMM列名；中国组件制造商须独立向MNRE申请。
summary.zht: 中國對出口市場的並網光伏逆變器沒有類似的「經批准製造商名單」制度。中國逆變器廠商在國內依據GB標準及CQC/CGC認證進行監管，政府不維護類似的逆變器出口白名單。對於出口印度的光伏組件，政府/補貼項目須取得ALMM列名；中國組件製造商須獨立向MNRE申請。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (photovoltaic grid-connected inverter — domestic CN standard)

gap.en: For inverters: ALMM is NOT applicable — the binding mandatory requirement is BIS CRS registration (IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980:2022). There is no separate MNRE ALMM registration step for inverters. For modules and cells used in the same project: ALMM listing is required for government/subsidy projects and represents a separate barrier that Chinese module manufacturers must address independently.
gap.zh: 就逆变器而言：ALMM不适用——强制性要求是BIS CRS注册（IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980:2022），逆变器无需单独进行MNRE ALMM注册。就同一项目中使用的光伏组件和电池而言：政府/补贴项目须取得ALMM列名，这是中国组件制造商须独立应对的另一项壁垒。
gap.zht: 就逆變器而言：ALMM不適用——強制性要求是BIS CRS註冊（IS 16221 Part 2 / IS 16169 / IS 17980:2022），逆變器無需單獨進行MNRE ALMM註冊。就同一項目中使用的光伏組件和電池而言：政府/補貼項目須取得ALMM列名，這是中國組件製造商須獨立應對的另一項壁垒。

mandatory_status.target: ALMM mandatory for government-funded, net-metered, and subsidy-linked solar projects in India — applies to PV Modules (List-I) and PV Cells (List-II) ONLY; ALMM does NOT apply to inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent regime exists in China for export-bound inverters or modules

source.publisher: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] ALMM does not apply to grid-tied PV inverters — MNRE ALMM List-I covers PV Modules and List-II covers PV Cells only. The binding mandatory requirement for inverters is BIS CRS registration (IS 16221 Part 2, IS 16169, IS 17980:2022). Chinese inverter manufacturers must obtain BIS CRS registration; no ALMM registration is required for inverters. For PV modules supplied in the same project, ALMM listing remains a separate requirement. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ALMM不适用于并网光伏逆变器——MNRE ALMM List-I仅涵盖光伏组件，List-II仅涵盖光伏电池。逆变器的强制性要求是BIS CRS注册（IS 16221 Part 2、IS 16169、IS 17980:2022）。中国逆变器制造商须取得BIS CRS注册，逆变器无需ALMM注册。同一项目中供应的光伏组件仍须单独满足ALMM列名要求。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ALMM不適用於並網光伏逆變器——MNRE ALMM List-I僅涵蓋光伏組件，List-II僅涵蓋光伏電池。逆變器的強制性要求是BIS CRS註冊（IS 16221 Part 2、IS 16169、IS 17980:2022）。中國逆變器製造商須取得BIS CRS註冊，逆變器無需ALMM註冊。同一項目中供應的光伏組件仍須單獨滿足ALMM列名要求。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管意見。
